commands.review_summary:
The PR captures one `installedAt` value for CLI install and update writes, then adds Vitest assertions that origin metadata and lockfile metadata receive the same value.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main has separate install `Date.now()` calls and update paths that preserve the origin timestamp while writing a fresh lockfile timestamp. I did not execute the CLI because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated repair is needed right now; the remaining blocker is contributor real behavior proof plus normal maintainer review of the narrow CLI metadata fix.

target.title: fix: use consistent installedAt timestamp for origin.json and lockfile
